heading: The Stalker
raw: Here the shortest path isn’t the simplest. The more indirect, the less risk there is.
clean: Here the shortest path isn't the simplest. The more indirect, the less risk there is.

heading: The Stalker
raw: I’ve never met a single happy person in my life.
clean: I've never met a single happy person in my life.

heading: The Stalker
raw: This is the most important moment of your life. Your sincerest desire will come true here. The desire that has made you suffer most.
clean: This is the most important moment of your life. Your sincerest desire will come true here. The desire that has made you suffer most.

heading: The Stalker
raw: He wants to destroy your hope. There is nothing left on Earth. This is the only place to come when all hope is lost! Why destroy hope!
clean: He wants to destroy your hope. There is nothing left on Earth. This is the only place to come when all hope is lost! Why destroy hope!

heading: The Writer
raw: A man writes because he is tormented, because he doubts. He needs to constantly prove to himself and the others that he's worth something. And if I know for sure that I'm a genius? Why write then? What the hell for?
clean: A man writes because he is tormented, because he doubts. He needs to constantly prove to himself and the others that he's worth something. And if I know for sure that I'm a genius? Why write then? What the hell for?

heading: The Writer
raw: My conscience wants vegetarianism to win over the world. And my subconscious is yearning for a piece of juicy meat. But what do I want?
clean: My conscience wants vegetarianism to win over the world. And my subconscious is yearning for a piece of juicy meat. But what do I want?

heading: The Writer
raw: While I am digging for the truth, so much happens to it that instead of discovering the truth I dig up a heap of, pardon... I'd better not name it.
clean: While I am digging for the truth, so much happens to it that instead of discovering the truth I dig up a heap of, pardon... I'd better not name it.

heading: The Writer
raw: You're a bad judge of human nature if you bring people like me into the Zone.
clean: You're a bad judge of human nature if you bring people like me into the Zone.

heading: The Writer
raw: What comes true here is that which reflects your true nature. The most secret desire. It is within you. It governs you. Yet you are ignorant of it.
clean: What comes true here is that which reflects your true nature. The most secret desire. It is within you. It governs you. Yet you are ignorant of it.

heading: The Writer
raw: Porcupine was given the essence of his true nature. Conscience and soul-searching were all invented by the mind. When he realized all that, he hanged himself.
clean: Porcupine was given the essence of his true nature. Conscience and soul-searching were all invented by the mind. When he realized all that, he hanged himself.

heading: The Writer
raw: I won’t go into your room. I won’t pour the filth of my soul on to anyone’s head.
clean: I won't go into your room. I won't pour the filth of my soul on to anyone's head.

heading: Dialogues
raw: Stalker. Well, here is the Dry Tunnel.
clean: Stalker. Well, here is the Dry Tunnel.

heading: Dialogues
raw: Stalker. This is a local joke. Usually you need to swim here.
clean: Stalker. This is a local joke. Usually you need to swim here.
